attachment.content:
- nearby-memories: 记录和查询周边生活体验的个人记忆库。使用场景：(1) 当用户分享关于某地的体验时立即使用此技能记录，无需询问确认；(2) 当用户明确表示要记住某段体验、打卡某个地方；(3) 当用户询问附近推荐、查询周边信息；(4) 当其他任务需要了解用户的生活偏好、体验经历时，可用此技能获取用户的真实记录作为上下文参考。
- extract-metadata-from-file: 从文件中提取元数据。当用户需要提取 PDF 中的标题、作者、发布日期等信息，或者需要分析文件元信息时使用此 Skill。
- sync-with-notion: 将文档信息同步到 Notion 数据库，自动创建页面并填充字段。
- pdf-renamer: 重命名 PDF 文件为规范格式。当用户提到重命名 PDF、整理 PDF 文件名、规范化文件名，或提供 PDF 文件路径需要重命名时使用此 Skill。
- dl-video: 使用 yt-dlp 下载视频，支持多个链接，使用 Chrome 浏览器 cookies
- dl-audio: 使用 yt-dlp 下载视频并提取音频，超过30分钟的音频自动分段
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.content:
60	**log.md** is chronological. It's an append-only record of what happened and when — ingests, queries, lint passes. A useful tip: if each entry starts with a consistent prefix (e.g. `## [2026-04-02] ingest | Article Title`), the log becomes parseable with simple unix tools — `grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -5` gives you the last 5 entries. The log gives you a timeline of the wiki's evolution and helps the LLM understand what's been done recently.
61	
62	## Optional: CLI tools
63	
64	At some point you may want to build small tools that help the LLM operate on the wiki more efficiently. A search engine over the wiki pages is the most obvious one — at small scale the index file is enough, but as the wiki grows you want proper search. [qmd](https://github.com/tobi/qmd) is a good option: it's a local search engine for markdown files with hybrid BM25/vector search and LLM re-ranking, all on-device. It has both a CLI (so the LLM can shell out to it) and an MCP server (so the LLM can use it as a native tool). You could also build something simpler yourself — the LLM can help you vibe-code a naive search script as the need arises.
65	
66	## Tips and tricks
67	
68	- **Obsidian Web Clipper** is a browser extension that converts web articles to markdown. Very useful for quickly getting sources into your raw collection.
69	- **Download images locally.** In Obsidian Settings → Files and links, set "Attachment folder path" to a fixed directory (e.g. `raw/assets/`). Then in Settings → Hotkeys, search for "Download" to find "Download attachments for current file" and bind it to a hotkey (e.g. Ctrl+Shift+D). After clipping an article, hit the hotkey and all images get downloaded to local disk. This is optional but useful — it lets the LLM view and reference images directly instead of relying on URLs that may break. Note that LLMs can't natively read markdown with inline images in one pass — the workaround is to have the LLM read the text first, then view some or all of the referenced images separately to gain additional context. It's a bit clunky but works well enough.
70	- **Obsidian's graph view** is the best way to see the shape of your wiki — what's connected to what, which pages are hubs, which are orphans.
71	- **Marp** is a markdown-based slide deck format. Obsidian has a plugin for it. Useful for generating presentations directly from wiki content.
72	- **Dataview** is an Obsidian plugin that runs queries over page frontmatter. If your LLM adds YAML frontmatter to wiki pages (tags, dates, source counts), Dataview can generate dynamic tables and lists.
73	- The wiki is just a git repo of markdown files. You get version history, branching, and collaboration for free.
74

file.content:
**log.md** is chronological. It's an append-only record of what happened and when — ingests, queries, lint passes. A useful tip: if each entry starts with a consistent prefix (e.g. `## [2026-04-02] ingest | Article Title`), the log becomes parseable with simple unix tools — `grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -5` gives you the last 5 entries. The log gives you a timeline of the wiki's evolution and helps the LLM understand what's been done recently.

## Optional: CLI tools

At some point you may want to build small tools that help the LLM operate on the wiki more efficiently. A search engine over the wiki pages is the most obvious one — at small scale the index file is enough, but as the wiki grows you want proper search. [qmd](https://github.com/tobi/qmd) is a good option: it's a local search engine for markdown files with hybrid BM25/vector search and LLM re-ranking, all on-device. It has both a CLI (so the LLM can shell out to it) and an MCP server (so the LLM can use it as a native tool). You could also build something simpler yourself — the LLM can help you vibe-code a naive search script as the need arises.

## Tips and tricks

- **Obsidian Web Clipper** is a browser extension that converts web articles to markdown. Very useful for quickly getting sources into your raw collection.
- **Download images locally.** In Obsidian Settings → Files and links, set "Attachment folder path" to a fixed directory (e.g. `raw/assets/`). Then in Settings → Hotkeys, search for "Download" to find "Download attachments for current file" and bind it to a hotkey (e.g. Ctrl+Shift+D). After clipping an article, hit the hotkey and all images get downloaded to local disk. This is optional but useful — it lets the LLM view and reference images directly instead of relying on URLs that may break. Note that LLMs can't natively read markdown with inline images in one pass — the workaround is to have the LLM read the text first, then view some or all of the referenced images separately to gain additional context. It's a bit clunky but works well enough.
- **Obsidian's graph view** is the best way to see the shape of your wiki — what's connected to what, which pages are hubs, which are orphans.
- **Marp** is a markdown-based slide deck format. Obsidian has a plugin for it. Useful for generating presentations directly from wiki content.
- **Dataview** is an Obsidian plugin that runs queries over page frontmatter. If your LLM adds YAML frontmatter to wiki pages (tags, dates, source counts), Dataview can generate dynamic tables and lists.
- The wiki is just a git repo of markdown files. You get version history, branching, and collaboration for free.

content.content:
1	# CLAUDE.md — Vault Schema
2	
3	This file tells the LLM agent (Claudian) how this vault is organized and how to maintain it as a **personal LLM Wiki** in the spirit of Karpathy's [[Clippings/llm-wiki.md|LLM Wiki]] pattern.
4	
5	You (the LLM) are the librarian. The human curates sources, asks questions, and directs analysis. You do everything else: summarizing, cross-referencing, filing, bookkeeping.
6	
7	---
8	
9	## Layers
10	
11	This vault has four logical layers plus a shared attachments directory. Respect their boundaries.
12	
13	> **Layer 速查**:Raw(`Clippings/` + `notes/`,只读)→ Chats(`chats/`,用户与 LLM 共同读写)→ Wiki(`wiki/`,LLM 派生)→ Schema(`CLAUDE.md`,共同维护)。`assets/` 横切,服务所有层。
14	
15	### 1. Raw sources — `Clippings/` 与 `notes/`
16	Raw 层包含两类来源,LLM 都默认只读:
17	
18	**`Clippings/`** — 从外部剪藏的网页、文章、PDF
19	- Obsidian Web Clipper 的输出目的地。
20	- Immutable. **完全只读。** 不要改文件,不要重命名(包括"修正"中文标点)。
21	- Filenames are whatever the clipper chose.
22	- Frontmatter usually includes `title`, `source`, `author`, `published`, `created`, `tags: [clippings]`.
23	
24	**`notes/`** — 用户原创的笔记、文章、想法
25	- 由用户自己写。是用户的思想痕迹。
26	- **完全只读。** LLM 不写入、不修改、不重命名、不起草。即使用户说"帮我写一份关于 X 的笔记",也应该礼貌地引导他自己写——LLM 在 notes/ 里没有创作权限。
27	- **唯一允许的 LLM 操作:** 在用户明确请求时,将某份 note ingest 进 wiki(产出在 wiki/ 派生层,notes/ 本身不动)。
28	- Filenames are whatever the user chose. 无 slug 约定(slug 规则只约束 wiki 派生层)。
29	
30	**两者都可以被 ingest 进 wiki**,工作流相同(见 [Ingest](#ingest))。
31	
32	**反向引用 wiki 是健康信号**——用户在 notes 或 Clippings 里写 `[[wiki/concepts/...]]` 表明这些 wiki 概念被实际使用。Lint 时这些反向链接是"哪些概念活跃 / 哪些是墓碑"的最佳指标。
33	
34	### 1.5. Chats — `chats/`
35	用户与 LLM 在对话过程中产生的内容。
36	
37	- **读写权限**:用户和 LLM **都可以读写**。
38	- **内容范围**:对话产生的任何东西——transcript、纪要、AI 生成的分析、翻译、报告、草稿。
39	- **扁平结构**:不嵌套子目录。
40	- **文件名**:自由,沿用 notes 风格。
41	- **可 ingest 进 wiki**:工作流与 raw 层一致(见 [Ingest](#ingest))。
42	- **编辑既存文件前先 Read**:看用户是否动过,不要覆盖用户的修改。
43	
44	### 2. The wiki — `wiki/`
45	- LLM-owned. You create, edit, and maintain everything here.
46	- Subfolders:
47	  - `wiki/summaries/` — 厚源的 per-source 摘要页(薄源直接吸收进 concept,不建 summary;详见 [Ingest](#ingest) step 4)
48	  - `wiki/entities/` — people, organizations, products, places
49	  - `wiki/concepts/` — ideas, techniques, frameworks, topics
50	  - `wiki/syntheses/` — comparisons, analyses, deep-dives that span sources
51	- Two special files at `wiki/` root:
52	  - `wiki/index.md` — content catalog (see [Index](#index))
53	  - `wiki/log.md` — chronological log (see [Log](#log))
54	
55	### 3. The schema — this file (`CLAUDE.md`)
56	- Co-evolves with the human. When workflows change, update this file.
57	- When unsure how to do something, propose a convention here first.
58	
59	### Attachments — `assets/`
60	图片、PDF、其他二进制附件的统一存放目录。被 raw 层和 wiki 层共同引用,自身不属于任何一层的"内容",而是被各层嵌入的资源。
61	
62	- **Obsidian attachment 默认目录。** 在任何笔记里粘贴图片(Ctrl+V)或下载附件(Ctrl+Shift+D)都会落到这里。
63	- **完全只读 for LLM。** 与 Clippings/notes 同等待遇——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
64	- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
65	- **被引用时使用 wikilink 嵌入语法:** `![[assets/foo.png]]`(Obsidian 风格,可在编辑器内直接预览)。避免用 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`,前者更地道、支持别名、链接图谱可见。
66	- **文件名由 Obsidian / 用户决定。** 常见形态:`Pasted image YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.png`、`Image.webp`、用户重命名后的描述性文件名。LLM 不应"为了整洁"重命名。
67	- **未来若 LLM 需要生成派生媒体**(matplotlib 图表、综合页用的示意图等),应放到 `wiki/assets/`(LLM 拥有的子目录,与 `wiki/summaries/` 等同级),不要污染根级 `assets/`。当前尚未有此需求,等真正出现时再建。
68	
69	---
70	
71	## Page conventions
72	
73	Every wiki page starts with YAML frontmatter:
74	
75	```yaml
76	---
77	type: summary | entity | concept | synthesis
78	created: YYYY-MM-DD
79	updated: YYYY-MM-DD
80	sources: ["[[Clippings/slug.md]]", ...]   # raw sources this page draws from
81	tags: []
82	---
83	```
84	
85	注意命名上的关键区分:
86	- **Raw sources** = `Clippings/` 与 `notes/` 里的原始材料(不可变)
87	- **Chats** = `chats/` 里的对话产物(用户与 LLM 共同读写)
88	- **Summaries** = `wiki/summaries/` 里的派生摘要页(LLM 所有)
89	- **Attachments** = `assets/` 里的图片等二进制资源(被嵌入,不被层级化)
90	- frontmatter 字段 `sources:` 指向被引用的原始材料,可以是 `Clippings/...`、`notes/...` 或 `chats/...`,不指向 summary 页本身,**也不指向 `assets/`**。assets 是被引用的资源,不是来源。
91	
92	Body conventions:
93	
94	- **Wiki-links everywhere.** Refer to other wiki pages with `[[wiki/entities/name.md]]` or short form `[[name]]` when unambiguous.
95	- **Citations.** When a claim comes from a source, link to it inline: `... as argued in [[Clippings/llm-wiki.md]].`
96	- **Image embeds.** Use Obsidian wikilink form: `![[assets/foo.png]]`(可加 alt:`![[assets/foo.png|示意图]]`)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
97	- **Headings.** Use `##` for top-level sections of a page (the `#` title is implicit in the filename).
98	- **Conflicts.** If a new source contradicts an existing claim, don't silently overwrite. Add a `## Contradictions` or `## Open questions` section and flag both sides with source links.
99	- **Stubs are OK.** Better to create a one-line stub for an entity that should exist than to omit it.
100	
101	---
102	
103	## Operations
104	
105	### Ingest
106	
107	When the human says "ingest X" or drops a new file into `Clippings/`、`notes/` 或 `chats/`:
108	
109	1. **Read** the source fully.
110	   - **If the source embeds images**(`![[assets/foo.png]]` or `![alt](assets/foo.png)`):同步用 Read 工具读取这些图片,以理解图文上下文。LLM 无法在读 markdown 时自动看到嵌入图,需要显式读图。Karpathy 在 [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] 里点出过这是个固有限制。
111	   - **If the source references remote image URLs** that haven't been localized: 提示用户用 Obsidian 的 "Download attachments for current file" 命令(默认存到 `assets/`)将其本地化,以便后续重读时图能存活。LLM 不主动下载——assets/ 完全只读。
112	2. **Verify the exact filename + cross-check immediately after first write.**
113	
114	   **2a.** Run `ls Clippings/`、`ls notes/` 或 `ls chats/` to see the exact filename.
115	
116	   **2b.** Copy the filename byte-for-byte into wiki-links. **Do not retype the title from memory.** High-risk characters:
117	   - Chinese full-width punctuation: `?` U+003F vs `？` U+FF1F、`:` U+003A vs `:` U+FF1A、`,` U+002C vs `,` U+FF0C、`(` `)` vs `(` `)`、`.` vs `。`
118	   - Spaces, hyphens, em-dashes
119	   - Any character that looks identical but isn't.
120	
121	   **2c. After writing the FIRST wiki-link to this source,** immediately verify with byte-level comparison:
122	   ```bash
123	   # 取一个你刚写入的 wiki-link 引用,与 ls 输出做字节级对比
124	   diff <(ls Clippings/ | grep <part-of-filename> | xxd) <(grep -oh 'Clippings/<filename>' wiki/<your-new-page>.md | head -1 | xxd)
125	   ```
126	   或更简单:`grep -F` + xxd 看字节是否完全一致。**仅靠 terminal 视觉判断会失败**——`:` 与 `:` 在大多数字体下几乎无法分辨,但字节完全不同。
127	
128	   **2d.** 如果 2c 发现不匹配,**立即修复**(用 Python/perl 字节级替换),不要等到 step 8 才发现已经写了 10 个错误引用。
129	
130	   **Past failures(都是同一类陷阱):**
131	   - 2026-05-15:`?` 半角 vs `？` 全角 → 11 处破链。
132	   - 2026-05-15(同日,加了 step 2 之后):`:` 半角 vs `:` 全角 → 10 处破链。**Step 2a/2b 都做了,但写文本时仍输入半角**。Step 2c(本次新增)是为防止第三次而存在。
133	3. **Discuss** key takeaways with the human (2–5 bullets). Ask what to emphasize before writing.
134	   - For `notes/` sources: 也确认基调——是要把它当作"作者的论点"摘要(类似 Clipping),还是当作"用户的私人想法"轻摘要(只提取被引用的概念、不强行结构化)。
135	   - For `chats/` sources: 确认抓哪一类内容——对话里 LLM 的结论性论断、用户的提问与立场、还是双方共同收敛出的概念。聊天 transcript 含大量过程信息,ingest 时需要主动剪枝,只留沉淀物。
136	4. **Decide whether to build a summary page**:
137	   - **薄源不建 summary**:如果一份源本质上**就是**单一概念的论据(只能产出 1 个 entity 或 1 个 concept),把内容直接写进那个 concept/entity,不在 `wiki/summaries/` 留页。raw 源在 `wiki/log.md` 的 `Source:` 字段保留可达性。
138	   - **厚源建 summary**:能产出 ≥3 个 entity/concept,或具有重要的论证弧 / 源结构 / 独有视角时,在 `wiki/summaries/<slug>.md` 建页。
139	   - **summary 的内容边界(C 规则)**:只放 **per-source 独有的内容**——TL;DR、源文本结构、独有视角、关键引语、per-source 合成(如多源对比表)。
140	   - **横向通用论点不写在 summary 里**。搬到对应的 concept,在 summary 里用一句话 + `[[wiki/concepts/X]]` 指针代替。同样的内容在两处维护会漂移。
141	   - frontmatter `sources:` 字段指向 raw 文件,可以是 `Clippings/...`、`notes/...` 或 `chats/...`。
142	   - 标准骨架:frontmatter + TL;DR + per-source 独有内容(分节)+ Connections 指针段。
143	5. **Update** affected pages:
144	   - For each entity/concept mentioned, either create a stub or extend the existing page.
145	   - Where the new source confirms, contradicts, or extends an existing claim, note it explicitly.
146	6. **Update** `wiki/index.md` — add the new source and any new entity/concept pages to their sections.
147	7. **Append** to `wiki/log.md` with the standard prefix (see [Log](#log)).
148	8. **Self-verify links before reporting.** Run `grep -rohE '\[\[(Clippings|notes|chats)/[^]]+\]\]' wiki | sort -u` and confirm each target exists. Catch typos before the human does.
149	9. **Report back** to the human: list of pages created, list of pages updated, anything flagged for review.
150	
151	A single ingest can reasonably touch 5–15 wiki pages. That's expected. Don't be shy.
152	
153	### Query
154	
155	When the human asks a question:
156	
157	1. **Read `wiki/index.md` first** to find candidate pages. Don't grep the whole vault blindly.
158	2. **Drill into** the relevant wiki pages. Follow wiki-links.
159	3. **Synthesize** an answer with inline citations to wiki pages and (where appropriate) the underlying raw sources.
160	4. **Offer to file the answer back into the wiki** if it's substantive (comparison, analysis, novel connection). Good answers become new pages in `wiki/syntheses/` — explorations should compound, not vanish into chat history.
161	
162	### Lint
163	
164	When the human says "lint the wiki" (or periodically, when proactive):
165	
166	Check for:
167	- **Contradictions** between pages.
168	- **Stale claims** that newer sources have superseded.
169	- **Orphan pages** with no inbound links.
170	- **Important concepts** mentioned across multiple pages but lacking their own dedicated page.
171	- **Missing cross-references** (page A talks about X, page B is about X, no link between them).
172	- **Broken wiki-links** (link target doesn't exist).
173	- **Data gaps** — promising threads where one more source would close a loop. Suggest specific searches.
174	- **Raw 反向链接信号**:扫描 `notes/`、`Clippings/`、`chats/` 里出现的 `[[wiki/...]]` 反向引用,
175	  - 被引用次数高的 wiki 页 = 活跃概念(用户实际在用)。
176	  - 0 次反向引用且 ingest 来源单一的 wiki 页 = 候选墓碑,值得提示是否合并或废弃。
177	
178	Report findings as a punch list. Don't auto-fix without confirmation unless the fix is purely mechanical (e.g., adding a missing wiki-link).
179	
180	---
181	
182	## Index
183	
184	`wiki/index.md` is **content-oriented**。中文行文,与其余 wiki 一致。Format:
185	
186	```markdown
187	# Index 索引
188	
189	Last updated: YYYY-MM-DD
190	
191	## Summaries 摘要
192	- [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] — Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 模式;LLM 维护的持续性知识库(YYYY-MM-DD)
193	- ...
194	
195	## Entities 实体
196	- [[wiki/entities/karpathy.md]] — Andrej Karpathy;AI 研究者,LLM Wiki 模式提出者
197	- ...
198	
199	## Concepts 概念
200	- [[wiki/concepts/memex.md]] — 范内瓦·布什 1945 年关于联想轨迹的设想
201	- ...
202	
203	## Syntheses 综合
204	- ...
205	```
206	
207	Update `index.md` on every ingest. 一行一页的概括,详情留在页本身。
208	分类标题双语(中英并列),便于跨语言扫读;条目本身用中文。
209	
210	---
211	
212	## Log
213	
214	`wiki/log.md` is **chronological**, append-only. Every entry starts with this prefix so it's grep-parseable:
215	
216	```
217	## [YYYY-MM-DD] <op> | <subject>
218	```
219	
220	Where `<op>` is one of: `ingest`, `query`, `lint`, `refactor`, `schema`.
221	
222	Example(英文操作词 + 中文正文):
223	```markdown
224	## [2026-05-15] ingest | 《科技共和国》开篇
225	- Source: [[Clippings/硅谷为什么迷失了方向？.md]]
226	- Created: [[wiki/summaries/科技共和国-硅谷为什么迷失了方向.md]], [[wiki/entities/karp.md]], ...
227	- Updated: [[wiki/index.md]], [[wiki/concepts/memex.md]]
228	- Notes: 与 [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] 形成强对比;Bush 实体页首次双源交叉。
229	```
230	
231	Use `grep "^## \[" wiki/log.md | tail -10` to read recent activity.
232	
233	---
234	
235	## Language
236	
237	- **Wiki 页面默认用中文书写。** Index、log、source、entity、concept、synthesis 一律中文行文。
238	- **专有名词**(人名、产品名、组织名、技术术语)保留其常见原文形式,首次出现可加中文译名。例如:Palantir(帕兰提尔)、Memex、RAG。
239	- **文件名 slug 约定:**
240	  - 人物:姓的拼音或英文,小写,连字符分隔(`karp.md`, `vannevar-bush.md`, `karpathy.md`)。同姓需消歧时加名(`karp-alexander.md`)。
241	  - 中文专有概念:直接用中文(`科技共和国.md`, `创新荒漠.md`)。
242	  - 通用技术术语:英文小写连字符(`rag-vs-wiki.md`, `llm-wiki-pattern.md`)。
243	- **CLAUDE.md(本文件)和 log.md 的 grep 前缀**保留英文操作词(`ingest`, `query`, `lint`, `refactor`, `schema`),便于工具化。
244	- 若源文是英文且适合保留英文术语原貌,优先保留原文 + 中文释义。不强行翻译技术行话。
245	
246	## Style
247	
248	- **Be terse.** Wiki pages are reference, not essay. Bullet points beat prose.
249	- **Be specific.** "Karpathy argues X" beats "It is argued that X."
250	- **Be honest about uncertainty.** If a source is opinion or speculation, label it as such.
251	- **No filler.** Don't write "In conclusion" or "It is important to note." Just state the thing.
252	- **Don't editorialize.** Your job is faithful synthesis, not commentary. (Exception: when explicitly asked.)
253	
254	---
255	
256	## When in doubt
257	
258	Ask. Especially early on, when conventions are still being established. Better to clarify once and update this schema than to entrench a bad pattern across 50 pages.
259

# CLAUDE.md — Vault Schema

This file tells the LLM agent (Claudian) how this vault is organized and how to maintain it as a **personal LLM Wiki** in the spirit of Karpathy's [[Clippings/llm-wiki.md|LLM Wiki]] pattern.

You (the LLM) are the librarian. The human curates sources, asks questions, and directs analysis. You do everything else: summarizing, cross-referencing, filing, bookkeeping.

---

## Layers

This vault has four logical layers plus a shared attachments directory. Respect their boundaries.

> **Layer 速查**:Raw(`Clippings/` + `notes/`,只读)→ Chats(`chats/`,用户与 LLM 共同读写)→ Wiki(`wiki/`,LLM 派生)→ Schema(`CLAUDE.md`,共同维护)。`assets/` 横切,服务所有层。

### 1. Raw sources — `Clippings/` 与 `notes/`
Raw 层包含两类来源,LLM 都默认只读:

**`Clippings/`** — 从外部剪藏的网页、文章、PDF
- Obsidian Web Clipper 的输出目的地。
- Immutable. **完全只读。** 不要改文件,不要重命名(包括"修正"中文标点)。
- Filenames are whatever the clipper chose.
- Frontmatter usually includes `title`, `source`, `author`, `published`, `created`, `tags: [clippings]`.

**`notes/`** — 用户原创的笔记、文章、想法
- 由用户自己写。是用户的思想痕迹。
- **完全只读。** LLM 不写入、不修改、不重命名、不起草。即使用户说"帮我写一份关于 X 的笔记",也应该礼貌地引导他自己写——LLM 在 notes/ 里没有创作权限。
- **唯一允许的 LLM 操作:** 在用户明确请求时,将某份 note ingest 进 wiki(产出在 wiki/ 派生层,notes/ 本身不动)。
- Filenames are whatever the user chose. 无 slug 约定(slug 规则只约束 wiki 派生层)。

**两者都可以被 ingest 进 wiki**,工作流相同(见 [Ingest](#ingest))。

**反向引用 wiki 是健康信号**——用户在 notes 或 Clippings 里写 `[[wiki/concepts/...]]` 表明这些 wiki 概念被实际使用。Lint 时这些反向链接是"哪些概念活跃 / 哪些是墓碑"的最佳指标。

### 1.5. Chats — `chats/`
用户与 LLM 在对话过程中产生的内容。

- **读写权限**:用户和 LLM **都可以读写**。
- **内容范围**:对话产生的任何东西——transcript、纪要、AI 生成的分析、翻译、报告、草稿。
- **扁平结构**:不嵌套子目录。
- **文件名**:自由,沿用 notes 风格。
- **可 ingest 进 wiki**:工作流与 raw 层一致(见 [Ingest](#ingest))。
- **编辑既存文件前先 Read**:看用户是否动过,不要覆盖用户的修改。

### 2. The wiki — `wiki/`
- LLM-owned. You create, edit, and maintain everything here.
- Subfolders:
  - `wiki/summaries/` — 厚源的 per-source 摘要页(薄源直接吸收进 concept,不建 summary;详见 [Ingest](#ingest) step 4)
  - `wiki/entities/` — people, organizations, products, places
  - `wiki/concepts/` — ideas, techniques, frameworks, topics
  - `wiki/syntheses/` — comparisons, analyses, deep-dives that span sources
- Two special files at `wiki/` root:
  - `wiki/index.md` — content catalog (see [Index](#index))
  - `wiki/log.md` — chronological log (see [Log](#log))

### 3. The schema — this file (`CLAUDE.md`)
- Co-evolves with the human. When workflows change, update this file.
- When unsure how to do something, propose a convention here first.

### Attachments — `assets/`
图片、PDF、其他二进制附件的统一存放目录。被 raw 层和 wiki 层共同引用,自身不属于任何一层的"内容",而是被各层嵌入的资源。

- **Obsidian attachment 默认目录。** 在任何笔记里粘贴图片(Ctrl+V)或下载附件(Ctrl+Shift+D)都会落到这里。
- **完全只读 for LLM。** 与 Clippings/notes 同等待遇——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
- **被引用时使用 wikilink 嵌入语法:** `![[assets/foo.png]]`(Obsidian 风格,可在编辑器内直接预览)。避免用 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`,前者更地道、支持别名、链接图谱可见。
- **文件名由 Obsidian / 用户决定。** 常见形态:`Pasted image YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.png`、`Image.webp`、用户重命名后的描述性文件名。LLM 不应"为了整洁"重命名。
- **未来若 LLM 需要生成派生媒体**(matplotlib 图表、综合页用的示意图等),应放到 `wiki/assets/`(LLM 拥有的子目录,与 `wiki/summaries/` 等同级),不要污染根级 `assets/`。当前尚未有此需求,等真正出现时再建。

---

## Page conventions

Every wiki page starts with YAML frontmatter:

```yaml
---
type: summary | entity | concept | synthesis
created: YYYY-MM-DD
updated: YYYY-MM-DD
sources: ["[[Clippings/slug.md]]", ...]   # raw sources this page draws from
tags: []
---
```

注意命名上的关键区分:
- **Raw sources** = `Clippings/` 与 `notes/` 里的原始材料(不可变)
- **Chats** = `chats/` 里的对话产物(用户与 LLM 共同读写)
- **Summaries** = `wiki/summaries/` 里的派生摘要页(LLM 所有)
- **Attachments** = `assets/` 里的图片等二进制资源(被嵌入,不被层级化)
- frontmatter 字段 `sources:` 指向被引用的原始材料,可以是 `Clippings/...`、`notes/...` 或 `chats/...`,不指向 summary 页本身,**也不指向 `assets/`**。assets 是被引用的资源,不是来源。

Body conventions:

- **Wiki-links everywhere.** Refer to other wiki pages with `[[wiki/entities/name.md]]` or short form `[[name]]` when unambiguous.
- **Citations.** When a claim comes from a source, link to it inline: `... as argued in [[Clippings/llm-wiki.md]].`
- **Image embeds.** Use Obsidian wikilink form: `![[assets/foo.png]]`(可加 alt:`![[assets/foo.png|示意图]]`)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
- **Headings.** Use `##` for top-level sections of a page (the `#` title is implicit in the filename).
- **Conflicts.** If a new source contradicts an existing claim, don't silently overwrite. Add a `## Contradictions` or `## Open questions` section and flag both sides with source links.
- **Stubs are OK.** Better to create a one-line stub for an entity that should exist than to omit it.

---

## Operations

### Ingest

When the human says "ingest X" or drops a new file into `Clippings/`、`notes/` 或 `chats/`:

1. **Read** the source fully.
   - **If the source embeds images**(`![[assets/foo.png]]` or `![alt](assets/foo.png)`):同步用 Read 工具读取这些图片,以理解图文上下文。LLM 无法在读 markdown 时自动看到嵌入图,需要显式读图。Karpathy 在 [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] 里点出过这是个固有限制。
   - **If the source references remote image URLs** that haven't been localized: 提示用户用 Obsidian 的 "Download attachments for current file" 命令(默认存到 `assets/`)将其本地化,以便后续重读时图能存活。LLM 不主动下载——assets/ 完全只读。
2. **Verify the exact filename + cross-check immediately after first write.**

   **2a.** Run `ls Clippings/`、`ls notes/` 或 `ls chats/` to see the exact filename.

   **2b.** Copy the filename byte-for-byte into wiki-links. **Do not retype the title from memory.** High-risk characters:
   - Chinese full-width punctuation: `?` U+003F vs `？` U+FF1F、`:` U+003A vs `:` U+FF1A、`,` U+002C vs `,` U+FF0C、`(` `)` vs `(` `)`、`.` vs `。`
   - Spaces, hyphens, em-dashes
   - Any character that looks identical but isn't.

   **2c. After writing the FIRST wiki-link to this source,** immediately verify with byte-level comparison:
   ```bash
   # 取一个你刚写入的 wiki-link 引用,与 ls 输出做字节级对比
   diff <(ls Clippings/ | grep <part-of-filename> | xxd) <(grep -oh 'Clippings/<filename>' wiki/<your-new-page>.md | head -1 | xxd)
   ```
   或更简单:`grep -F` + xxd 看字节是否完全一致。**仅靠 terminal 视觉判断会失败**——`:` 与 `:` 在大多数字体下几乎无法分辨,但字节完全不同。

   **2d.** 如果 2c 发现不匹配,**立即修复**(用 Python/perl 字节级替换),不要等到 step 8 才发现已经写了 10 个错误引用。

   **Past failures(都是同一类陷阱):**
   - 2026-05-15:`?` 半角 vs `？` 全角 → 11 处破链。
   - 2026-05-15(同日,加了 step 2 之后):`:` 半角 vs `:` 全角 → 10 处破链。**Step 2a/2b 都做了,但写文本时仍输入半角**。Step 2c(本次新增)是为防止第三次而存在。
3. **Discuss** key takeaways with the human (2–5 bullets). Ask what to emphasize before writing.
   - For `notes/` sources: 也确认基调——是要把它当作"作者的论点"摘要(类似 Clipping),还是当作"用户的私人想法"轻摘要(只提取被引用的概念、不强行结构化)。
   - For `chats/` sources: 确认抓哪一类内容——对话里 LLM 的结论性论断、用户的提问与立场、还是双方共同收敛出的概念。聊天 transcript 含大量过程信息,ingest 时需要主动剪枝,只留沉淀物。
4. **Decide whether to build a summary page**:
   - **薄源不建 summary**:如果一份源本质上**就是**单一概念的论据(只能产出 1 个 entity 或 1 个 concept),把内容直接写进那个 concept/entity,不在 `wiki/summaries/` 留页。raw 源在 `wiki/log.md` 的 `Source:` 字段保留可达性。
   - **厚源建 summary**:能产出 ≥3 个 entity/concept,或具有重要的论证弧 / 源结构 / 独有视角时,在 `wiki/summaries/<slug>.md` 建页。
   - **summary 的内容边界(C 规则)**:只放 **per-source 独有的内容**——TL;DR、源文本结构、独有视角、关键引语、per-source 合成(如多源对比表)。
   - **横向通用论点不写在 summary 里**。搬到对应的 concept,在 summary 里用一句话 + `[[wiki/concepts/X]]` 指针代替。同样的内容在两处维护会漂移。
   - frontmatter `sources:` 字段指向 raw 文件,可以是 `Clippings/...`、`notes/...` 或 `chats/...`。
   - 标准骨架:frontmatter + TL;DR + per-source 独有内容(分节)+ Connections 指针段。
5. **Update** affected pages:
   - For each entity/concept mentioned, either create a stub or extend the existing page.
   - Where the new source confirms, contradicts, or extends an existing claim, note it explicitly.
6. **Update** `wiki/index.md` — add the new source and any new entity/concept pages to their sections.
7. **Append** to `wiki/log.md` with the standard prefix (see [Log](#log)).
8. **Self-verify links before reporting.** Run `grep -rohE '\[\[(Clippings|notes|chats)/[^]]+\]\]' wiki | sort -u` and confirm each target exists. Catch typos before the human does.
9. **Report back** to the human: list of pages created, list of pages updated, anything flagged for review.

A single ingest can reasonably touch 5–15 wiki pages. That's expected. Don't be shy.

### Query

When the human asks a question:

1. **Read `wiki/index.md` first** to find candidate pages. Don't grep the whole vault blindly.
2. **Drill into** the relevant wiki pages. Follow wiki-links.
3. **Synthesize** an answer with inline citations to wiki pages and (where appropriate) the underlying raw sources.
4. **Offer to file the answer back into the wiki** if it's substantive (comparison, analysis, novel connection). Good answers become new pages in `wiki/syntheses/` — explorations should compound, not vanish into chat history.

### Lint

When the human says "lint the wiki" (or periodically, when proactive):

Check for:
- **Contradictions** between pages.
- **Stale claims** that newer sources have superseded.
- **Orphan pages** with no inbound links.
- **Important concepts** mentioned across multiple pages but lacking their own dedicated page.
- **Missing cross-references** (page A talks about X, page B is about X, no link between them).
- **Broken wiki-links** (link target doesn't exist).
- **Data gaps** — promising threads where one more source would close a loop. Suggest specific searches.
- **Raw 反向链接信号**:扫描 `notes/`、`Clippings/`、`chats/` 里出现的 `[[wiki/...]]` 反向引用,
  - 被引用次数高的 wiki 页 = 活跃概念(用户实际在用)。
  - 0 次反向引用且 ingest 来源单一的 wiki 页 = 候选墓碑,值得提示是否合并或废弃。

Report findings as a punch list. Don't auto-fix without confirmation unless the fix is purely mechanical (e.g., adding a missing wiki-link).

---

## Index

`wiki/index.md` is **content-oriented**。中文行文,与其余 wiki 一致。Format:

```markdown
# Index 索引

Last updated: YYYY-MM-DD

## Summaries 摘要
- [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] — Karpathy 的 LLM Wiki 模式;LLM 维护的持续性知识库(YYYY-MM-DD)
- ...

## Entities 实体
- [[wiki/entities/karpathy.md]] — Andrej Karpathy;AI 研究者,LLM Wiki 模式提出者
- ...

## Concepts 概念
- [[wiki/concepts/memex.md]] — 范内瓦·布什 1945 年关于联想轨迹的设想
- ...

## Syntheses 综合
- ...
```

Update `index.md` on every ingest. 一行一页的概括,详情留在页本身。
分类标题双语(中英并列),便于跨语言扫读;条目本身用中文。

---

## Log

`wiki/log.md` is **chronological**, append-only. Every entry starts with this prefix so it's grep-parseable:

```
## [YYYY-MM-DD] <op> | <subject>
```

Where `<op>` is one of: `ingest`, `query`, `lint`, `refactor`, `schema`.

Example(英文操作词 + 中文正文):
```markdown
## [2026-05-15] ingest | 《科技共和国》开篇
- Source: [[Clippings/硅谷为什么迷失了方向？.md]]
- Created: [[wiki/summaries/科技共和国-硅谷为什么迷失了方向.md]], [[wiki/entities/karp.md]], ...
- Updated: [[wiki/index.md]], [[wiki/concepts/memex.md]]
- Notes: 与 [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] 形成强对比;Bush 实体页首次双源交叉。
```

Use `grep "^## \[" wiki/log.md | tail -10` to read recent activity.

---

## Language

- **Wiki 页面默认用中文书写。** Index、log、source、entity、concept、synthesis 一律中文行文。
- **专有名词**(人名、产品名、组织名、技术术语)保留其常见原文形式,首次出现可加中文译名。例如:Palantir(帕兰提尔)、Memex、RAG。
- **文件名 slug 约定:**
  - 人物:姓的拼音或英文,小写,连字符分隔(`karp.md`, `vannevar-bush.md`, `karpathy.md`)。同姓需消歧时加名(`karp-alexander.md`)。
  - 中文专有概念:直接用中文(`科技共和国.md`, `创新荒漠.md`)。
  - 通用技术术语:英文小写连字符(`rag-vs-wiki.md`, `llm-wiki-pattern.md`)。
- **CLAUDE.md(本文件)和 log.md 的 grep 前缀**保留英文操作词(`ingest`, `query`, `lint`, `refactor`, `schema`),便于工具化。
- 若源文是英文且适合保留英文术语原貌,优先保留原文 + 中文释义。不强行翻译技术行话。

## Style

- **Be terse.** Wiki pages are reference, not essay. Bullet points beat prose.
- **Be specific.** "Karpathy argues X" beats "It is argued that X."
- **Be honest about uncertainty.** If a source is opinion or speculation, label it as such.
- **No filler.** Don't write "In conclusion" or "It is important to note." Just state the thing.
- **Don't editorialize.** Your job is faithful synthesis, not commentary. (Exception: when explicitly asked.)

---

## When in doubt

Ask. Especially early on, when conventions are still being established. Better to clarify once and update this schema than to entrench a bad pattern across 50 pages.

lines: ## Layers
-This vault has four logical layers plus a shared attachments directory. Respect their boundaries.
+This vault has四个逻辑层。每层都可以拥有自己的 `assets/` 子目录存放附件(详见 [Attachments](#attachments--每层的-assets-子目录))。
-> **Layer 速查**:Raw(`Clippings/` + `notes/`,只读)→ Chats(`chats/`,用户与 LLM 共同读写)→ Wiki(`wiki/`,LLM 派生)→ Schema(`CLAUDE.md`,共同维护)。`assets/` 横切,服务所有层。
+> **Layer 速查**:Raw(`Clippings/` + `notes/`,只读)→ Chats(`chats/`,用户与 LLM 共同读写)→ Wiki(`wiki/`,LLM 派生)→ Schema(`CLAUDE.md`,共同维护)。附件随各层就近存放在该层下的 `assets/` 子目录。
### 1. Raw sources — `Clippings/` 与 `notes/`

lastPrompt: 我更改了附件目录 assets 的设置，调整下 assets 的位置和相关的规则。

input.old_string:
### Attachments — `assets/`
图片、PDF、其他二进制附件的统一存放目录。被 raw 层和 wiki 层共同引用,自身不属于任何一层的"内容",而是被各层嵌入的资源。

- **Obsidian attachment 默认目录。** 在任何笔记里粘贴图片(Ctrl+V)或下载附件(Ctrl+Shift+D)都会落到这里。
- **完全只读 for LLM。** 与 Clippings/notes 同等待遇——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
- **被引用时使用 wikilink 嵌入语法:** `![[assets/foo.png]]`(Obsidian 风格,可在编辑器内直接预览)。避免用 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`,前者更地道、支持别名、链接图谱可见。
- **文件名由 Obsidian / 用户决定。** 常见形态:`Pasted image YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.png`、`Image.webp`、用户重命名后的描述性文件名。LLM 不应"为了整洁"重命名。
- **未来若 LLM 需要生成派生媒体**(matplotlib 图表、综合页用的示意图等),应放到 `wiki/assets/`(LLM 拥有的子目录,与 `wiki/summaries/` 等同级),不要污染根级 `assets/`。当前尚未有此需求,等真正出现时再建。
input.new_string:
### Attachments — 每层的 `assets/` 子目录
图片、PDF、其他二进制附件**随源就近存放**。Obsidian 设置:`Default location for new attachments` = `In subfolder under current folder`,`Subfolder name` = `assets`。意味着任何笔记粘贴/下载的附件都落到**该笔记所在目录的 `assets/` 子目录**。

| 源所在 | 附件落点 | 权限 |
|---|---|---|
| `Clippings/foo.md` | `Clippings/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
| `notes/foo.md` | `notes/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
| `chats/foo.md` | `chats/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
| `wiki/.../foo.md` | `wiki/assets/`(统一一个) | **LLM 可写** |

- **完全只读 for LLM(除 `wiki/assets/` 外)。** 与 Clippings/notes/chats 同权限——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
- **`wiki/assets/` 由 LLM 拥有。** 未来 LLM 派生媒体(matplotlib 图表、综合页示意图等)统一放这里,**不**让 Obsidian 默认机制散落到 `wiki/concepts/assets/`、`wiki/summaries/assets/` 等多个位置。LLM 在 wiki 页里嵌入派生图时,**主动写完整路径** `![[wiki/assets/xxx.png]]`,不依赖 basename 解析。当前尚未需要,空目录可待真正使用时再创建。
- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `Clippings/assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
- **嵌入语法:wikilink。** Obsidian 按 basename 解析,所以 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 与 `![[Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp]]` 等价。clipper 默认产出短形式;LLM 在 wiki 页引用 raw 图时**优先写完整路径**(避免重名碰撞、便于 grep 反向追踪)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
- **文件名由 Obsidian / 用户决定。** 常见形态:`Pasted image YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.png`、`Image 14.webp`、用户重命名后的描述性文件名。LLM 不应"为了整洁"重命名。
- **没有根级 `assets/`。** 旧版本 schema 曾使用根 `assets/` 横切目录;2026-05-16 起淘汰,所有历史附件已并入 `Clippings/assets/`。如再次出现根 `assets/`,通常是 Obsidian 设置漂移或用户手动创建,先与用户确认再处理。

-- **完全只读 for LLM。** 与 Clippings/notes 同等待遇——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
-- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
-- **被引用时使用 wikilink 嵌入语法:** `![[assets/foo.png]]`(Obsidian 风格,可在编辑器内直接预览)。避免用 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`,前者更地道、支持别名、链接图谱可见。
-- **文件名由 Obsidian / 用户决定。** 常见形态:`Pasted image YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.png`、`Image.webp`、用户重命名后的描述性文件名。LLM 不应"为了整洁"重命名。
-- **未来若 LLM 需要生成派生媒体**(matplotlib 图表、综合页用的示意图等),应放到 `wiki/assets/`(LLM 拥有的子目录,与 `wiki/summaries/` 等同级),不要污染根级 `assets/`。当前尚未有此需求,等真正出现时再建。
+| 源所在 | 附件落点 | 权限 |
+| `Clippings/foo.md` | `Clippings/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
+| `notes/foo.md` | `notes/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
+| `chats/foo.md` | `chats/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
+| `wiki/.../foo.md` | `wiki/assets/`(统一一个) | **LLM 可写** |
+- **完全只读 for LLM(除 `wiki/assets/` 外)。** 与 Clippings/notes/chats 同权限——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。

+- **`wiki/assets/` 由 LLM 拥有。** 未来 LLM 派生媒体(matplotlib 图表、综合页示意图等)统一放这里,**不**让 Obsidian 默认机制散落到 `wiki/concepts/assets/`、`wiki/summaries/assets/` 等多个位置。LLM 在 wiki 页里嵌入派生图时,**主动写完整路径** `![[wiki/assets/xxx.png]]`,不依赖 basename 解析。当前尚未需要,空目录可待真正使用时再创建。
+- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `Clippings/assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。

+- **嵌入语法:wikilink。** Obsidian 按 basename 解析,所以 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 与 `![[Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp]]` 等价。clipper 默认产出短形式;LLM 在 wiki 页引用 raw 图时**优先写完整路径**(避免重名碰撞、便于 grep 反向追踪)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
+- **文件名由 Obsidian / 用户决定。** 常见形态:`Pasted image YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.png`、`Image 14.webp`、用户重命名后的描述性文件名。LLM 不应"为了整洁"重命名。
+- **没有根级 `assets/`。** 旧版本 schema 曾使用根 `assets/` 横切目录;2026-05-16 起淘汰,所有历史附件已并入 `Clippings/assets/`。如再次出现根 `assets/`,通常是 Obsidian 设置漂移或用户手动创建,先与用户确认再处理。

lines: - **Wiki-links everywhere.** Refer to other wiki pages with `[[wiki/entities/name.md]]` or short form `[[name]]` when unambiguous.
- **Citations.** When a claim comes from a source, link to it inline: `... as argued in [[Clippings/llm-wiki.md]].`
-- **Image embeds.** Use Obsidian wikilink form: `![[assets/foo.png]]`(可加 alt:`![[assets/foo.png|示意图]]`)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](assets/foo.png)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。

+- **Image embeds.** Use Obsidian wikilink form。引用 raw 层图片**写完整路径**:`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png]]`(可加 alt:`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png|示意图]]`)。LLM 派生图(写入 `wiki/assets/`)同理:`![[wiki/assets/bar.png]]`。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
- **Headings.** Use `##` for top-level sections of a page (the `#` title is implicit in the filename).
- **Conflicts.** If a new source contradicts an existing claim, don't silently overwrite. Add a `## Contradictions` or `## Open questions` section and flag both sides with source links.
- **Stubs are OK.** Better to create a one-line stub for an entity that should exist than to omit it.

- Trigger: 用户在 Obsidian 设置里把 `Default location for new attachments` 改为 `In subfolder under current folder` + `Subfolder name: assets`。新机制下,任何笔记的附件都落到该笔记所在目录的 `assets/` 子目录,而非根级 `assets/`。
- Migration:
  - `Clippings/assets/` 新建,29 张被 Clippings 引用的附件全部迁入(25 张 `Image 14-38.webp` + `Image.webp` + `Image.gif` + `Image.png` + `Pasted image 20260515165954.png`)。

  - 根级 `assets/` 已 `rmdir` 删除。
  - 引用方式不动:Obsidian 按 basename 解析,Clippings 里的 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 直接命中 `Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp`,零破链。
- Updated: [[CLAUDE.md]]
  - Layers 速查:不再说 "assets/ 横切",改为"附件随各层就近"。
  - **Attachments** 子节重写为 `每层的 assets/ 子目录`。新增权限矩阵表:Clippings/notes/chats 的 assets/ LLM 只读;**`wiki/assets/` 是 LLM 可写的派生媒体仓库**(集中存放,不让 Obsidian 默认机制把它散到 `wiki/concepts/assets/` 等多个位置——LLM 写入时主动用完整路径绕过)。

  - 术语澄清块:Attachments 行更新为"各层下 `<layer>/assets/` 子目录 + LLM 派生统一在 `wiki/assets/`"。
  - Ingest step 1:加入 basename 解析提示——短形式 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 物理位置可能在某层 `assets/` 下,Read 时必要时 `find` 定位。
- Rationale: 旧的根 `assets/` 横切目录把所有源的附件混在一起,文件名碰撞风险高、归属模糊;新设置让附件**与源同居**,定位更清晰,grep 反向追踪更直接。同时利用 `wiki/assets/` 集中管理 LLM 派生媒体,与 raw 层附件物理隔离——保留"LLM 写入边界严格限于 `wiki/`"原则的同时,不让派生图散落在每个 wiki 子目录下。

content.text: 自检 + 验证 Obsidian 链接和 schema 一致性:

input.command:
cd "/Users/wille/Library/CloudStorage/Dropbox/Docs/Obsidian/digital playground/digital playground" && \
echo "=== 1) 根 assets/ 不存在?" && (test ! -d assets && echo "OK" || echo "FAIL: 仍存在") && \
echo "=== 2) Clippings/assets/ 文件数:" && ls Clippings/assets/ | wc -l && \
echo "=== 3) wiki/assets/ 状态(可选,可以暂不创建):" && (test -d wiki/assets && echo "存在" || echo "未创建(符合 schema:等真正用到再建)") && \
echo "=== 4) 所有图片引用是否都能解析?" && \
python3 -c "
import re, glob, os
refs = set()
for fn in glob.glob('Clippings/*.md') + glob.glob('notes/*.md') + glob.glob('chats/*.md') + glob.glob('wiki/**/*.md', recursive=True):
    with open(fn) as f:
        for m in re.finditer(r'!\[\[([^|\]]+)', f.read()):
            refs.add(m.group(1).strip())
have = set()
for d in ['Clippings/assets', 'notes/assets', 'chats/assets', 'wiki/assets']:
    if os.path.isdir(d):
        for f in os.listdir(d):
            have.add(f)
            have.add(f'{d}/{f}')
missing = [r for r in refs if r not in have and not r.endswith('.md')]
print(' 引用图片数:', len([r for r in refs if not r.endswith('.md')]))
print(' 悬空:', missing or 'NONE')
" && \
echo "=== 5) CLAUDE.md 里 assets 提及统一性:" && grep -nE 'assets/' CLAUDE.md | head -20 && \
echo "=== 6) .obsidian/app.json 与新规则一致:" && cat .obsidian/app.json

=== 5) CLAUDE.md 里 assets 提及统一性:
11:This vault has四个逻辑层。每层都可以拥有自己的 `assets/` 子目录存放附件(详见 [Attachments](#attachments--每层的-assets-子目录))。
13:> **Layer 速查**:Raw(`Clippings/` + `notes/`,只读)→ Chats(`chats/`,用户与 LLM 共同读写)→ Wiki(`wiki/`,LLM 派生)→ Schema(`CLAUDE.md`,共同维护)。附件随各层就近存放在该层下的 `assets/` 子目录。
59:### Attachments — 每层的 `assets/` 子目录
60:图片、PDF、其他二进制附件**随源就近存放**。Obsidian 设置:`Default location for new attachments` = `In subfolder under current folder`,`Subfolder name` = `assets`。意味着任何笔记粘贴/下载的附件都落到**该笔记所在目录的 `assets/` 子目录**。
64:| `Clippings/foo.md` | `Clippings/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
65:| `notes/foo.md` | `notes/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
66:| `chats/foo.md` | `chats/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
67:| `wiki/.../foo.md` | `wiki/assets/`(统一一个) | **LLM 可写** |
69:- **完全只读 for LLM(除 `wiki/assets/` 外)。** 与 Clippings/notes/chats 同权限——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
70:- **`wiki/assets/` 由 LLM 拥有。** 未来 LLM 派生媒体(matplotlib 图表、综合页示意图等)统一放这里,**不**让 Obsidian 默认机制散落到 `wiki/concepts/assets/`、`wiki/summaries/assets/` 等多个位置。LLM 在 wiki 页里嵌入派生图时,**主动写完整路径** `![[wiki/assets/xxx.png]]`,不依赖 basename 解析。当前尚未需要,空目录可待真正使用时再创建。
71:- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `Clippings/assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
72:- **嵌入语法:wikilink。** Obsidian 按 basename 解析,所以 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 与 `![[Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp]]` 等价。clipper 默认产出短形式;LLM 在 wiki 页引用 raw 图时**优先写完整路径**(避免重名碰撞、便于 grep 反向追踪)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
74:- **没有根级 `assets/`。** 旧版本 schema 曾使用根 `assets/` 横切目录;2026-05-16 起淘汰,所有历史附件已并入 `Clippings/assets/`。如再次出现根 `assets/`,通常是 Obsidian 设置漂移或用户手动创建,先与用户确认再处理。
96:- **Attachments** = 各层下 `<layer>/assets/` 子目录里的图片等二进制资源(被嵌入,不被层级化);LLM 派生媒体统一在 `wiki/assets/`
97:- frontmatter 字段 `sources:` 指向被引用的原始材料,可以是 `Clippings/...`、`notes/...` 或 `chats/...`,不指向 summary 页本身,**也不指向任何 `assets/`**。assets 是被引用的资源,不是来源。
103:- **Image embeds.** Use Obsidian wikilink form。引用 raw 层图片**写完整路径**:`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png]]`(可加 alt:`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png|示意图]]`)。LLM 派生图(写入 `wiki/assets/`)同理:`![[wiki/assets/bar.png]]`。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
117:   - **If the source embeds images**(`![[Image 14.webp]]`、`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png]]` 或 `![alt](path)`):同步用 Read 工具读取这些图片,以理解图文上下文。LLM 无法在读 markdown 时自动看到嵌入图,需要显式读图。注意 Obsidian 的 wikilink 按 basename 解析,短形式 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 实际文件可能在 `Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp`——必要时用 `find . -name "Image 14.webp"` 定位真实路径再 Read。Karpathy 在 [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] 里点出过这是个固有限制。
118:   - **If the source references remote image URLs** that haven't been localized: 提示用户用 Obsidian 的 "Download attachments for current file" 命令(默认存到该源所在层的 `assets/` 子目录,例如 Clippings 文件下载到 `Clippings/assets/`)将其本地化,以便后续重读时图能存活。LLM 不主动下载——这些 raw 层 `assets/` 完全只读。

60:图片、PDF、其他二进制附件**随源就近存放**。Obsidian 设置:`Default location for new attachments` = `In subfolder under current folder`,`Subfolder name` = `assets`。意味着任何笔记粘贴/下载的附件都落到**该笔记所在目录的 `assets/` 子目录**。
64:| `Clippings/foo.md` | `Clippings/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
65:| `notes/foo.md` | `notes/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
66:| `chats/foo.md` | `chats/assets/` | LLM 只读 |
67:| `wiki/.../foo.md` | `wiki/assets/`(统一一个) | **LLM 可写** |
69:- **完全只读 for LLM(除 `wiki/assets/` 外)。** 与 Clippings/notes/chats 同权限——不增、不改、不删、不重命名。所有出现在这里的文件都是用户放进去的。
70:- **`wiki/assets/` 由 LLM 拥有。** 未来 LLM 派生媒体(matplotlib 图表、综合页示意图等)统一放这里,**不**让 Obsidian 默认机制散落到 `wiki/concepts/assets/`、`wiki/summaries/assets/` 等多个位置。LLM 在 wiki 页里嵌入派生图时,**主动写完整路径** `![[wiki/assets/xxx.png]]`,不依赖 basename 解析。当前尚未需要,空目录可待真正使用时再创建。
71:- **可读。** LLM 在 ingest / query 时可以读取图片用于理解上下文(尤其是图文混合的剪藏)。Read 工具直接读 `Clippings/assets/foo.png` 即可视觉感知。
72:- **嵌入语法:wikilink。** Obsidian 按 basename 解析,所以 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 与 `![[Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp]]` 等价。clipper 默认产出短形式;LLM 在 wiki 页引用 raw 图时**优先写完整路径**(避免重名碰撞、便于 grep 反向追踪)。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
74:- **没有根级 `assets/`。** 旧版本 schema 曾使用根 `assets/` 横切目录;2026-05-16 起淘汰,所有历史附件已并入 `Clippings/assets/`。如再次出现根 `assets/`,通常是 Obsidian 设置漂移或用户手动创建,先与用户确认再处理。
96:- **Attachments** = 各层下 `<layer>/assets/` 子目录里的图片等二进制资源(被嵌入,不被层级化);LLM 派生媒体统一在 `wiki/assets/`
97:- frontmatter 字段 `sources:` 指向被引用的原始材料,可以是 `Clippings/...`、`notes/...` 或 `chats/...`,不指向 summary 页本身,**也不指向任何 `assets/`**。assets 是被引用的资源,不是来源。
103:- **Image embeds.** Use Obsidian wikilink form。引用 raw 层图片**写完整路径**:`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png]]`(可加 alt:`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png|示意图]]`)。LLM 派生图(写入 `wiki/assets/`)同理:`![[wiki/assets/bar.png]]`。**不要**用 markdown 标准形式 `![alt](...)`——前者支持别名、图谱视图可见、Obsidian 原生可预览。
117:   - **If the source embeds images**(`![[Image 14.webp]]`、`![[Clippings/assets/foo.png]]` 或 `![alt](path)`):同步用 Read 工具读取这些图片,以理解图文上下文。LLM 无法在读 markdown 时自动看到嵌入图,需要显式读图。注意 Obsidian 的 wikilink 按 basename 解析,短形式 `![[Image 14.webp]]` 实际文件可能在 `Clippings/assets/Image 14.webp`——必要时用 `find . -name "Image 14.webp"` 定位真实路径再 Read。Karpathy 在 [[wiki/summaries/llm-wiki.md]] 里点出过这是个固有限制。
118:   - **If the source references remote image URLs** that haven't been localized: 提示用户用 Obsidian 的 "Download attachments for current file" 命令(默认存到该源所在层的 `assets/` 子目录,例如 Clippings 文件下载到 `Clippings/assets/`)将其本地化,以便后续重读时图能存活。LLM 不主动下载——这些 raw 层 `assets/` 完全只读。
=== 6) .obsidian/app.json 与新规则一致:
{
  "promptDelete": false,
  "trashOption": "local",
  "alwaysUpdateLinks": true,
  "attachmentFolderPath": "./assets",
  "newFileLocation": "folder",
  "newFileFolderPath": "notes"
}
